name: ElevenLabsTrivia
short: Voice trivia run by an ElevenLabs Conversational AI agent
description: Joins a Discord voice channel and bridges audio bidirectionally between voice-channel participants and an ElevenLabs Conversational AI agent that hosts trivia. Supports topic selection (OSRS by default).
author: Benjamin
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild ElevenLabs API key and agent ID configuration. It transmits voice-channel audio to the ElevenLabs Conversational AI service while a session is active; voice data is not persisted by this cog.
